title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules for successfully building projects with Claude Code, drawn from Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan's philosophy. He outlines six leadership moves for leading an AI team and a four-question test to evaluate projects before starting, based on his experience scaling companies and building with Claude.
